'''Yin Wood Goat''' is the 32nd of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 乙 Kinoto (yin wood, the luna-aligned face of spring), and its branch is 未 Hitsuji, the [[Goat (zodiac)|Goat]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's wood overcomes the branch's earth, a relationship of restraint.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Wood Horse]] (node 31) and [[Yang Fire Monkey]] (node 33).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kinoto (乙)]] — yin wood
* '''Branch:''' [[Goat (zodiac)|Goat (未)]] — yin earth
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' spring

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Wood Horse]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Fire Monkey]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q1062025}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
